frontier: Whether the current Hadamard-design seam has acquired any new executable construction evidence.
action: Performed the bounded control-plane verification: source/scope parity, prior-receipt lineage, queue state, and protected-data stability.
verified: The verification passed: zero changed-condition markers, stable protected-data fingerprints, and no forbidden side effects.
result: Negative result preserved: no new payload, theorem map, schema defect, or fixture-hardening artifact exists. The seam remains non-executable and should rotate rather than consume solver effort.
next_gate: Reopen only on a concrete new construction artifact or explicit hardening request; otherwise calibrate/rotate to another FrontierMath basin.
boundary_held: No production Atlas writes, external submissions, git pushes, or training unless explicitly authorized.
